affected_pattern: Charges spike exactly 2x for a contiguous window of accounts processed after a Kafka consumer rebalance
root_cause: Kafka consumer group rebalance replay — the rating consumer's offset commit was asynchronous and the rebalance replayed ~5 minutes of billing records, causing the same events to be charged twice.
supporting_evidence: Duplicate Charge RCA Playbook: Kafka Replay on Rebalance pattern
Consumer lag chart shows spike and replay at rebalance timestamp
enable.auto.commit=true and commit interval exceeded processing latency
recommended_action: Switch rating consumer to synchronous commit after successful rating
Introduce idempotency key (billing record ID + billing_cycle) at the charge-insert step
Issue reversals for the duplicate charge window
Add consumer-lag-spike alert as an early signal
